title: aeschynanthus micranthus
intro: Aeschynanthus micranthus, also known as the Goldfish Plant, is a flowering evergreen perennial native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its leaves and flowers, which are traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions. Aeschynanthus micranthus is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The plant's leaves and flowers can be prepared as a tea or infused in hot water to promote relaxation and relieve stress, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine.
